name: vertical-construction
description: Domain knowledge for the construction vertical (contractors, field crews) so architect and pm don't spec construction products naively. Covers the vocabulary (bid vs estimate, takeoff, retainage, change order, AIA G702/G703, lien waiver, draw schedule), the non-obvious money rules that incumbents like Procore price out of reach for small contractors, what a naive build gets wrong (no assemblies, ignored retainage, ungated sub payments), and the entities that must be modelled. Applied by architec
author: avelikiy
